data.name: Femdom Girlfriend 5: Sophie's Morning Torment
data.detailed_description:
As usual, Sophie, your hyper-sadistic girlfriend, treats you like her pet and bullies you to her heart's content. You and Sophie love each other, and because you love Sophie so much, you consent to become her human punching bag, letting her use you to unleash her overwhelmingly sadistic urges. Despite the way Sophie treats you, she loves you deeply, and her sadistic torment is an expression of her love.

Experience a day with Sophie, your sexy, big-breasted, sadistic girlfriend who makes your inner masochist come out.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 19 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Sophie, your hyper-sadistic girlfriend, treats you like her pet and bullies you to her heart's content in the morning.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
